title: rosa dumalis f. fraxinoides
intro: Rosa dumalis f. fraxinoides, also known as the Fragrant Raspberry Rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa dumalis plant, a type of wild rose native to Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of salicylic acid and other bioactive compounds. The Fragrant Raspberry Rose has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and has also been used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Rosa dumalis f. fraxinoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and creams for topical application.
